OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ClientContract_AddConifgHelper

childElements.name: DRP_CreateContractWithContractType
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "accountId" : "%AccountId%", "parentContractId" : "%ContractId%", "contractType" : "%ContractType%", "recordTypeId" : "%SV_ContractFields:clientContractRecordTypeId%", "PNC" : "%SelectServiceAccount:ServiceAccounts%", "contractNumber" : "%ContractNumber%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "TransformClientContractRecords", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRPCreateContractWithContractType", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_ContractFields
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "clientContractRecordTypeId" : "=QUERY(\"select Id from RecordType where DeveloperName = '{0}' and SobjectType = '{1}'\",'Client_Contract','Contract')" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: TransformClientContractRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRTTransformClientContractRecords", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DeleteContract
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "deleteSObject" : [ { "Type" : "Contract", "Id" : "%contractId%", "AllOrNone" : false } ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "allOrNone" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DeleteAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: GetClientContractDetails
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "contractId" : "=%ContractId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DREClientContractConfigDetails", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DREPNCRecords
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "ContractId" : "%ContractId%", "ContractType" : "%ContractType%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DREPNCRecords", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LA_FilterServiceAccounts
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "matchingPath" : "Id", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "listKey" : "DREPNCRecords:CPNR", "matchingPath" : "PNCId", "normalizeKey" : "1" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : true, "mergeFields" : [ "pncId" ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "DREPNCRecords:CPNR", "DREPNCRecords:PNC" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { "ExistingPncId" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(%ExistingPncId%),%ExistingPncId%,'')" }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LA_FinalServiceAccounts
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "matchingPath" : "Id", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "matchingPath" : "PNCId", "normalizeKey" : "1" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : true, "mergeFields" : [ "pncId" ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "LA_FilterServiceAccounts" ], "filterListFormula" : "=ExistingPncId == ''", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: RA_ServiceAccounts
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "propMapType" : { "required" : true, "fieldName" : "ServiceAccounts", "options" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(%LA_FinalServiceAccounts%),LIST(%LA_FinalServiceAccounts%),LIST())", "label" : "Service Accounts", "componentName" : "ServiceAccounts", "stepName" : "SelectServiceAccount" }, "AccountId" : "%DREPNCRecords:AccountId%", "ContractNumber" : "%DREPNCRecords:ContractNumber%" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }
